commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5166907fe3b3807f25c53bd623d13959a61c61a9)
commands.review_summary:
The branch makes block reply dispatch and source reply transcript mirroring asynchronous, serializes source transcript mirrors per session, and moves Telegram direct typing earlier after access checks.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is included. Source inspection shows current main awaits dispatcher idle after block replies and awaits source transcript mirroring before `message.action` responds, while the PR tests simulate the latency/order path.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer rebase plus real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not queue repair while the external proof gate is missing.

target.title: [codex] avoid blocking reply sends on bookkeeping
target.body:
## Summary
- stop awaiting direct block reply delivery on every block callback; instead flush pending block delivery before subsequent tool/progress events
- keep ACP direct block replies non-blocking while preserving block-before-tool delivery ordering
- schedule source reply transcript mirroring after successful `message.action` sends without blocking the gateway response
- serialize async source transcript mirrors per session so same-session transcript chronology is preserved
- send Telegram direct-message typing once access has passed, before later context/session construction can delay the indicator, while avoiding a duplicate immediate cue

## Root Cause
Recent reply changes made lightweight replies wait on delivery bookkeeping in the hot path: block callbacks waited for dispatcher idle, and `message.action` waited for transcript mirroring after platform delivery. The 36-54h window also includes Telegram dispatch replay dedupe changes that added work before the existing typing cue path.

## Impact
Simple visible replies can return sooner while user-visible send order and the existing block-before-tool/progress ordering guarantee are preserved. Transcript mirroring remains best-effort and still runs after successful source-conversation sends, with per-session ordering to avoid mirrored transcript reordering. Telegram direct typing now starts earlier after authorization without sending an extra duplicate initial cue.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp-delivery.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/send.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.typing.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.typing.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.typing.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
